title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - Starting with no WiFi connection
feature: App Settings - General - Account - Account Delete
scenario: Delete account with no WiFi connection, then retry after reconnecting to verify account removal on device and cloud.
steps: Observe the popup: 'Unable to perform task...'
Tap 'Later' and verify the popup closes and returns to Device Settings.
Tap Delete icon again, then Confirm.
Tap 'Retry' and verify the same error popup appears.
Tap 'Retry' and observe a spinner followed by a confirmation dialog.
Verify the user is logged out and returned to the account screen.
Verify the user is not logged in via Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account.
On the cloud side, verify the account was properly removed.
expected: "Unable to perform task..." popup appears when WiFi is off. Tapping "Later" closes the popup and returns to Device Settings. Tapping Delete + Confirm again, then "Retry" shows the same error. After turning on WiFi and tapping "Retry", a spinner appears followed by a confirmation dialog, user is logged out and returned to the account screen. User is not logged in via Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account. On cloud side, the account is properly removed.
